name: chr20_20q13_13_NCOA3_SD
description: 20q13.12 SD region containing NCOA3 (AIB1/SRC-3 nuclear-receptor coactivator), SULF2 and PROCR. A classical 20q13 amplicon target in breast / ovarian cancer; flanked by ~30-80 kb SDs that contribute to amplification breakpoints.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct SDs of 30-80 kb at 95-98% identity flanking NCOA3, SULF2; somatic copy-number gain in 5-10% of breast cancers; recurrent breakpoint hotspots in the flanking SDs.
